---
title: "QGIS HW5"
author: "Kunaal Raghav"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Package Installation

```{r}
#install.packages("sf")
#install.packages("tidyverse")
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}

my_shapefile <- read_sf("C:/Users/xbox/OneDrive/Collect Files/Collect Files/MPP- Graduate  AU/Graduate Paperwork/PUAD 631/EdgeSchool/EDGE_SCHOOLDISTRICT_TL25_SY2425.shp")


my_csv <- read_csv("C:/Users/xbox/OneDrive/Collect Files/Collect Files/MPP- Graduate  AU/Graduate Paperwork/PUAD 631/Enrollment_Decline_E_ample_GIS_files_export/enr_decline_2018_2020_GEOID.csv")


joined_data <- left_join(my_shapefile, my_csv, by = "GEOID")

st_write(joined_data, "C:/Users/xbox/OneDrive/Collect Files/Collect Files/MPP- Graduate  AU/Graduate Paperwork/PUAD 631/titlefile.shp")


```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
